adapters.label: GopherMind
adapters.install_hint: brew install jbrahy/tap/gophermind — or build from https://github.com/jbrahy/gophermind.com
adapters.description: A minimal agentic coding harness for OpenAI-compatible LLMs. Streams via a Claude-Code-compatible stream-json protocol with pre-assigned sessions and resume; maps sandbox to a read-only plan mode.

adapters.label: GopherMind (read-only)
adapters.install_hint: brew install jbrahy/tap/gophermind — or build from https://github.com/jbrahy/gophermind.com
adapters.description: Read-only variant of the GopherMind adapter: every invocation passes --read-only, so all mutating tools (write/edit/shell/move/delete/mkdir/patch) are denied. Use for safe exploration and planning.
